title: AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 4773 / 52 OG No. 7, 3533 (July, 1956)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1468, June 14, 1956 ]

AN ACT AMENDING CERTAIN ITEMS OF SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Item twenty, under Negros Occidental school buildings, subsection ai. of section three, page five hundred twenty-four, of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven, is amended to read as follows:

"20. Eusebio Memorial School Building, Sagay芒聙聰

Construction芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄.................... P5,000.00

"20a. Campo Himogaan Primary School,

Sagay芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄........芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄........ 5,000.00

"20b. Makiling Barrio School, Sagay芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄 5,000.00

"20c. Completion and Painting of Himogaan Barrio Home

Economics School Building, Sagay芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄. 3,000.00

"20d. Completion and Painting of Barrio Bato Primary

School Building, Sagay 芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄 2,000.00"

SEC. 2. Item twenty-four, page five hundred four of the same Act, is amended to read as follows:

"24. Barrio Plaridel Primary School

Building, Sagay芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄芒聙娄 P5,000.00"
SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.
